metadata.name: Analyze Opponent's Brief for Key Arguments

description: An attorney needs to analyze an opponent's motion brief to identify their key legal arguments in order to draft a response.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the full text of the document.

nodes.task_description: Identify the main headings and subheadings to understand the structure of their argument.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an outline of the opponent's brief.

nodes.task_description: For each section, summarize the core legal argument being made and the key cases they rely on.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a summary that will serve as the basis for drafting a reply brief.
